chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. S – 260 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 13-10-2025 Mr. Atta Hussain Chandio, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Saeed Ahmed Wassan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh Mr. Gulzar Ahmed Malano, Assistant PG for the State along with SIP Gulzar Abro on behalf of SSP, Khairpur, ASI Mohsin Ali of PS Mirwah >>>>>..<<<<< Statement has been filed by respondents 3, 4 and 5, which are taken on record. Learned AAG submits that the official respondents shall act in accordance with the law. On such statement of the learned AAG, learned counsel for the Petitioner being satisfied seeks disposal of instant Petition. Accordingly, the instant Petition is disposed of; however the official respondents are directed to act strictly in accordance with the law and official respondents shall also provide protection to the petitioner, as and when required. Judge ARBROHI/PS
